title: Star Fractal
description: A recursive star-like fractal generator with animation.

title: Reflections inside a closed mirror
description: A circular light wave reflection simulation inside an closed shaped mirror.

title: Truchet-Smith Tiling
description: Smith's version of Truchet tiling with user defined tiling functions.

title: Hexagonal Truchet-Smith Tiling
description: Hexagonal variant of the Smith's version of Truchet tiling with user defined tiling functions.

title: Chaos with Angle Paths
description: Drawing angle paths with function based angle rotation that produce chaotic but beautiful patterns.

title: Limits of Our Knowledge
description: This is an article that discusses about the limits of the knowledge that we discover and can prove to ourselves.

title: Square Turns
description: A turtle walks. At every step, it turns — not by a fixed angle, but by an amount that grows with the square of the step count. What emerges is surprisingly beautiful.
